title: Super mario sunshine Glitch: Walking under pianta village
description:
Español: este es un glitch que encontre en super mario sunshine mientras jugaba en pianta village. Me cai usando a yoshi en el shine 5 y despues quede caminando sobre donde me deberia caer. ¡Disfruten el video! 

English: This is a glitch that I found in super mario sunshine while I played in pianta village. I fell riding yoshi in the 5th shine and then I was walking where I should fall. Enjoy!
